changelog: Channel Mosaic — watch 2x2 or 2x3 live streams simultaneously
EPG Timeline Grid — horizontal scroll guide with 12-hour window
Channel timers — long-press any program to set a reminder notification
Android TV D-pad navigation overhauled — focus highlight, LEFT/RIGHT wired
Settings fixed — status messages restored, changelog live, backup scrolls
Hero banner, stream stats overlay, external player support, voice search
